creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
>> (2014/03/03 @ 2301 EST): Takefu said, in 160K: <<
> Patch worked well with the exception of the pkg-message.
> So I have changed.
> 
> p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-Alt, ja-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin
> I arranged the PORTREVISION.
> 
> ja-p5-Mail-SpamAssassin
> The patch fixes.
>> end of "Re: ports/186756: [UPDATE] mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin: update to 3.4.0" from Takefu <<

Ahh, I did goof with the pkg-message! Your patch works great.

# Adam
